name: Pluak Daeng town and worker-service core
capture_notes: District center, hospital, market, and retail-food activity create year-round charging demand from residents, workers, and town services.

name: Amata City Rayong employment basin
capture_notes: Large industrial estate catchment with shift-change traffic, supplier movement, and strong commuter demand through the western Pluak Daeng side.

name: WHA Eastern Seaboard industrial cluster
capture_notes: Northern and north-western industrial estate concentration supporting logistics, staff commuting, and service-fleet charging.

name: Highway 331 Pluak Daeng industrial connector
capture_notes: Industrial connector movement across Highway 331 and estate-serving roads makes this a strong corridor demand band beyond a single destination point.
